query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_scenes, SUM(CASE WHEN illustrationKey IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_key, SUM(CASE WHEN illustrationUrl LIKE '%X-Amz-Algorithm%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as expired_presigned FROM storyScenes;
